headline: Shares of health insurance companies are trading higher after the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services announced a 2.48% rate hike for 2027 Medicare Advantage and Part D programs.
summary: Shares of health insurance companies are trading higher after the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services announced a 2.48% rate hike for 2027 Medicare Advantage and Part D programs.

headline: Medicare Finalizes 2.48% Rate Hike For Private Insurers In 2027
